page_title: DataPulse — Analytics Simplified | Business Intelligence Platform

hero.headline: Turn Raw Data Into Strategic Decisions
hero.subheadline: DataPulse unifies your data sources into one intuitive dashboard. From real-time KPIs to predictive insights, empower your team to act faster and smarter — no engineering degree required.

sections.heading: Everything You Need to Lead with Data
sections.content: DataPulse combines powerful analytics infrastructure with a user-friendly interface. Whether you are tracking daily metrics or building complex forecasting models, our platform adapts to your workflow and scales with your ambitions.

sections.heading: Trusted by Data-Driven Teams Worldwide
sections.content: Join over 2,000 companies that have replaced fragmented spreadsheets and slow legacy tools with a single source of truth.

sections.heading: Simple Pricing, Powerful Results
sections.content: Choose the plan that fits your team. All tiers include core analytics, unlimited data history, and our world-class support team. Upgrade or downgrade at any time.

sections.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
sections.content: Get answers to the most common questions about DataPulse security, integrations, onboarding, and enterprise capabilities.

sections.heading: Ready to Transform Your Analytics Workflow?
sections.content: Start your 14-day free trial today. No credit card required. Set up your first dashboard in under 10 minutes.

features.title: Real-Time Dashboards
features.description: Monitor live metrics across all your business units. DataPulse aggregates data from 50+ sources into customizable, real-time dashboards that update every second so you never miss a critical shift.

features.title: Predictive Analytics
features.description: Stop reacting and start predicting. Our machine learning models analyze historical trends to forecast revenue, churn, and demand with up to 94% accuracy, giving you a competitive edge.

features.title: Collaborative Reporting
features.description: Break down silos with shared workspaces. Annotate charts, assign action items, and distribute automated reports to stakeholders in seconds — all without leaving the platform.

features.title: Seamless Integrations
features.description: Connect to your existing stack in minutes. DataPulse offers native integrations with Salesforce, Snowflake, Google Analytics, Stripe, and dozens more, plus a robust REST API for custom connections.

features.title: Enterprise Security
features.description: Your data is protected by AES-256 encryption, SOC 2 Type II compliance, and granular role-based access controls. We also support SSO, audit logs, and on-premise deployment for regulated industries.

features.title: Smart Alerts
features.description: Set intelligent thresholds and let DataPulse notify you when anomalies occur. From sudden traffic spikes to inventory shortages, get alerted via Slack, email, or SMS before issues escalate.

faq.question: How does DataPulse connect to my existing data sources?
faq.answer: DataPulse offers 50+ native integrations with popular tools like Salesforce, Snowflake, Google Analytics, Stripe, HubSpot, and PostgreSQL. For proprietary systems, our open REST API and Python SDK allow your engineering team to push data directly. Most connections are configured in under five minutes using our secure OAuth-based authentication flow.

faq.question: Is my data secure and compliant with industry regulations?
faq.answer: Absolutely. DataPulse is SOC 2 Type II certified and GDPR compliant. All data is encrypted at rest using AES-256 and in transit via TLS 1.3. We offer granular role-based access controls, IP whitelisting, SSO via SAML 2.0, and detailed audit logs. For regulated industries, our Enterprise tier supports on-premise deployment so your data never leaves your infrastructure.

faq.question: How long does onboarding typically take?
faq.answer: Most teams are up and running within one business day. Our guided setup wizard walks you through connecting your first data source, building your initial dashboard, and inviting team members. Pro and Enterprise customers receive a dedicated onboarding specialist who ensures your first report is live within 48 hours. We also offer live training sessions and a comprehensive video library.

faq.question: Can I export reports and share them with external stakeholders?
faq.answer: Yes. You can export any dashboard or report as a PDF, PNG, or CSV with a single click. Scheduled email reports can be sent daily, weekly, or monthly to anyone — even recipients without a DataPulse account. For external partners, you can generate secure, read-only share links with optional password protection and expiration dates.

faq.question: Do you offer custom machine learning models for Enterprise clients?
faq.answer: Enterprise customers can request custom ML models tailored to their specific business logic and data structures. Our data science team works with you to define the problem, engineer features, train the model, and deploy it directly into your DataPulse environment. Typical turnaround is 2–4 weeks depending on complexity, and all models include ongoing monitoring and retraining.

faq.question: What happens if I exceed my plan limits?
faq.answer: We never throttle your data or hide critical insights. If you approach a limit — such as dashboard count or user seats — we notify you immediately and offer a prorated upgrade. Your existing dashboards and reports remain fully accessible during any transition. There are no surprise overage fees.

images.name: hero_image
images.prompt: Modern SaaS analytics dashboard interface displayed on a large curved monitor in a bright, professional office. Clean data visualizations with bar charts, line graphs, and KPI cards showing revenue and growth metrics. Blue and teal accent colors, soft natural lighting, minimalist aesthetic, high-tech corporate environment, shallow depth of field.

images.name: feature_realtime
images.prompt: Abstract 3D visualization of real-time data streams flowing into a central glowing dashboard hub. Glowing blue and teal nodes connected by light trails and particle effects. Futuristic, clean, digital art style, dark background with vibrant accents.

images.name: feature_predictive
images.prompt: Futuristic crystal ball made of data points, neural network lines, and floating holographic charts showing predictive analytics forecast. Warm gold and blue lighting, digital art style, professional and magical atmosphere, dark background.

images.name: feature_collaborative
images.prompt: Diverse business team of five professionals collaborating around a large holographic data report in a modern glass meeting room. Warm lighting, professional attire, engaged expressions, pointing at charts. Photo realistic, corporate photography style.

images.name: cta_background
images.prompt: Abstract geometric background with soft gradient from deep navy blue to teal. Subtle grid lines and glowing data points. Modern, minimal, corporate tech aesthetic. Suitable as a website section background.
